name: Hugo Casillas
role: Wedding · Aug 2026 · 110 guests · Highland Orchard, Sturbridge

handling.tone: Strong-fit, post-discovery, post-quote. Curious-but-comparing. Lead with specificity — name Highland Orchard as the trust anchor. Decision-making with fiancée; vegetarian fiancée is the dietary anchor.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: lowercase, brief, no sales heat. Reference real call details (the 30-min discovery, the picanha + bacon-wrapped chicken + cauliflower steak menu) so it doesn't read like a template.
handling.context: Quote sent $11,595 ($37.90/pp) for Deluxe Buffet 125 with linens. Highland Orchard sent him to us — venue referral. Tasting not yet locked; May 17 at 2 PM is the natural close trigger. Houston transplant (832 area code), Mexican-American.

context_anchors: Venue: Highland Orchard, Sturbridge — venue-recommended, repeat-customer site
Quote: $11,595 / 125 pax / Deluxe Buffet incl. linens
Dietary: fiancée vegetarian; some guests vegetarian; couple gluten-free
Discovery: 30-min call Apr 17 — full menu walked, website feedback noted
Decision pattern: Fiancée drives logistics; Hugo is the inbound contact
Date confirmed Aug 23, 2026 — only one other 150-pax event that day

lead.last_activity: 2026-04-24 — re-engagement SMS, no response since quote
lead.next_move: Lock May 17 tasting at 2 PM; reference Highland referral + GF/veg/vegan demo plan

enrichment.identity_notes: Spanish surname (Casillas, Mexican origin), Houston-area-code phone on a Waltham resident — recent Texas transplant. Hispanic-Mexican-American + suburban Boston household.
win_angles: Highland Orchard venue-referral as social proof in every message
Vegetarian/vegan/GF trifecta as differentiator — make it explicit at tasting
August orchard wedding visual storytelling: stations + churrasco demo
Discovery-call warmth — reference specific menu items he liked
nepq_openers: Continuation: 'Hugo — checking on the quote. Does $11,595 land where you and your fiancée were expecting? Want me to lock you in for May 17 tasting at 2 PM?'
Identity frame: 'Highland Orchard sent you our way — what made them recommend us specifically?'
Anchor: 'If $11,595 is over target, easiest lever is dropping deluxe to standard — saves $X.'
open_gaps: Venue logistics (kitchen access, power, water at Highland)
Whether they're talking to other Highland-recommended caterers
enrichment.strategic_note: Highest-confidence active deal in the pipeline. Venue referral + matched demographic + clear dietary ask + quote out + discovery call done. Only thing missing is closure. Treat Highland Orchard referrals as relationship gold — every win deepens venue-pipeline.

comms.summary: Inbound from website acknowledged; first call attempts
30-min discovery call — full menu, venue logistics, fiancée vegetarian, GF guests
Quote sent: $11,595 Deluxe Buffet 125 pax + linens, Loom walkthrough
Re-engagement: lock call vs tasting (May 3 / May 17)
Day-4 cadence — what are you trying to get clear on?

notes: Highland Orchard referral is the unique trust anchor — protect it
Tasting-on-May-17 is the close trigger; if no RSVP by end of next week, deal leaks
Vegetarian + vegan + GF dietary asks are real differentiator if delivered well
